---
title: "Recreating Table 3 and 4: Statistical Analysis on 2 groups: prior antiretroviral therapy vs no prior antiretroviral therapy"
toc: true
date: today
author: Natallia

format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: true
editor: visual
editor-options:
  chunk-output-type: console
  
project:
  output-dir: output
  execute-dir: project

execute: 
  warning: false
  error: false
  freeze: true
---

```{r}
#| label: prepare-session
library(ucimlrepo)
library(tidyverse)
library(gtsummary)
library(gt)

data<-fetch_ucirepo(id=890)
data1<- data$data
df<- data1$original
```




```{r}
#| label: analysis
#| output: false







```



```{r}
#| label: tbl-therapy
#| tbl-cap: "Rates of Disease progression among patients with prior antiretroviral therapy"





```



```{r}
#| label: tbl-no-therapy
#| tbl-cap: "Rates of Disease progression among patients with no prior antiretroviral therapy"



```
